retry_reason: A put operation cannot be retried; a second call would cause an underflow (double-free).
contract_summary: cache_key_put releases a reference on a pcache_cache_key object. It is a put wrapper that decrements the kref count and triggers the cache_key_destroy callback when the count reaches zero. After this call, the caller must not access the key object. This function pairs with a corresponding get (kref_get or equivalent) that acquired the reference. No return value is provided; the operation is always unconditional.
